{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Grand Patriarch
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Grand Patriarch]] is a previous-generation Patriarch of the [[Li clan]] who has returned to the realm.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Grand Patriarch]] of [[Heaven's Glory]] is bound in scripted chains.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
